en: Don't ever slack up, punky better back up
ko: 절대 느슨해지지 마, punky는 물러서야 해

en: Try and play the role and yo the whole crew will act up
ko: 역할을 하려 하면, 전 crew가 난리칠 거야

en: Get up, stand up, come on throw your hands up
If you got the feeling, jump up touch the ceiling
Monks, let's all bunk up
Someone's talking junk, yo I'll bust them in the eye
ko: 누군가 헛소리하고 있어, 눈에 주먹을 날릴 거야

en: And then I'll take the punks out, feeling funky
ko: 그리고 그 punk들을 처치할 거야, 기분이 좋으니까

en: Amps in the trunk and I got more bombs
ko: 트렁크에 앰프가 있고, 더 많은 폭탄이 있어

en: And there's cops at a junkie's donut shop
ko: 그리고 약쟁이 도넛 가게에 경찰이 있어

en: Showing up, I got blood from the kids
On the hill with my mom and my pops
I came to get down, I came to get down
So get down to your seat and jump around
Jump around
Jump up, jump up and get down
Jump, jump, jump
Everybody jump, jump, jump
Jump, jump, jump, jump
Everybody jump, jump, jump
Jump, jump, jump, jump
I'll serve your ass like John McEnroe
ko: 네 엉덩이를 존 매켄로처럼 다룰 거야

en: If your girl steps up, I'm smacking her hard
ko: 네 여자친구가 나서면, 세게 때릴 거야

en: Word to your moms, I came to drop bombs
ko: 네 엄마에게 전해, 난 폭탄을 떨어뜨리러 왔어

en: I got more rhymes than the Bible's got psalms
ko: 난 성경의 시편보다 더 많은 라임이 있어

en: And just like Tabarak, the sun, I've returned
Anyone stepping on me, you'll get burnt
ko: 나를 밟는 사람은, 너는 타버릴 거야

en: Cause I got lyrics, but you ain't got none
ko: 난 가사가 있지만, 너는 아무것도 없어

en: If you come, you gotta bring a shotgun
